summary: Executed backend + frontend regression on public URL after refactor. Core requested flows pass (page load, feedback dialog open/close, waitlist render, sorting/filtering, row-to-detail sheet open, tab switching, API endpoints). One non-blocking runtime issue persists: Recharts width/height warnings during sheet tab transitions.

integration_issues.issue: Console warnings repeat: Recharts container reports width(-1)/height(-1) during tab/sheet transitions.

action_items: Stabilize chart mounting inside Sheet/Tabs to avoid Recharts width(-1)/height(-1) warnings.
Consider rendering charts only when container dimensions are measurable (or add a size guard before mount).
critical_code_review_comments: No blocking functional regressions found in requested refactor scope.
Data-testid coverage is strong for key interactions and supports maintainable UI automation.
Reference doc path /app/auth_testing.md is missing in workspace; not blocking for this non-auth scope but should be restored for future auth triage consistency.
seed_data_creation: None. Fundamental company universe remains STATIC SEEDED FRONTEND DATASET (MOCKED DATASET ONLY), while feedback/waitlist/summary use real backend persistence.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated live URL https://fundamental-checker.preview.emergentagent.com. Backend pytest (5 tests) fully passed. UI flows validated: home load, feedback dialog open/close, waitlist card render, sort + quick filter interactions, detail sheet open, all requested tabs render. Non-blocking Recharts sizing warnings are reproducible during tab transitions.
rca of the issue: RCA: Recharts ResponsiveContainer initializes while parent container is transitioning/temporarily non-measurable inside Sheet+Tabs. Reproduction: open any company detail sheet and switch between chart tabs quickly; observe width(-1)/height(-1) warnings in console. Mitigation: defer chart mount until active tab is visible and measured (non-zero dimensions), or trigger chart render after layout settle/ResizeObserver confirmation.
